data.body: FIX IMPLEMENTED (bug 0ba4): added shared finalize_event(event,ticket_id,event_type,data,tracker,repo_root) to _seam.py (attribution + _apply_authorship, no commit) — the ONE signing choke point. Routed append_event + txn.transition_core + txn.claim_core (transition/claim/close) + delete.py (_write_event/_write_unlink: STATUS(deleted)/ARCHIVED/UNLINK) through it; each keeps its own atomic commit/lock. Exemption + require_authenticated refusal live inside _apply_authorship so all callers inherit them. SNAPSHOT (compaction) intentionally left attribution-only: the merge-gate re-verifies the snapshot's authorship_ledger (preserved signed source events), not the SNAPSHOT event. Held-out oracle (test_identity_txn_signing_heldout.py, 5 tests): transition/claim/close STATUS+EDIT signed, verify under merge-gate, unsignable transition refused. ruff+mypy clean, 5/5 pass. Running full suite for regressions. Then teeth check + land via Gerrit + re-assess store for any remaining unsigned in-scope writers.
